cost_components_summary: Indicative non-commodity CO2 storage cost placeholder. Reservoir appraisal, injection capacity, monitoring and liability treatment are not yet represented.
input_basis_notes: No commodity input is attached in the minimum placeholder. Injection energy and storage-site constraints should be added with explicit storage network detail.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct emissions are zero in this placeholder. Storage receives captured or removed CO2 and does not by itself create a negative-emissions credit.
rollout_limit_notes: No rollout limit is calibrated; zero demand anchor prevents forced activity in default runs.
availability_conditions: Available as a topology placeholder in all milestone years; scenario authors should review before relying on quantities.
evidence_summary: Carbon-management placeholders draw on CCS and removals uncertainty framing rather than facility-level Australian network evidence.
derivation_method: Minimum viable placeholder preserving topology and upgrade path without forcing baseline activity.
review_notes: Low-confidence placeholder for visibility and process-chain migration only; not a calibrated infrastructure model.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into basin-specific storage resources, injection capacity, monitoring, reversal risk and liability constraints.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Maps to geological storage sink processes with capacity and monitoring constraints in TIMES or VEDA-style models.
